heading: State control of operations
label: 8137 State control of operations
text: Except as otherwise specifically provided, nothing in this subchapter shall be construed as conferring on any Federal officer or employee the right to exercise any supervision or control over the administration, personnel, maintenance, or operation of any State home for which facilities are constructed or acquired with assistance received under this subchapter.
notes: Amendments1991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–40section 5037 of this title1984— inserted “or acquired” after “constructed”.Pub. L. 98–528
